response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed to identify any on-screen song titles or artist credits. None were present in the lower thirds or intro/outro screens. A general search for 'Hololive Gamers concert' was performed to check for song metadata, but no specific song title or lyrics could be reliably matched to the music played in the first 30 seconds. The rest of the video contains dialogue and character introductions. Therefore, no lyrics could be provided.
response.global_summary: A segment from a Hololive concert featuring VTubers Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone. The video consists of the performers singing and interacting with the audience at a large, light-stick-filled stadium, followed by intros and dialogue from each member of 'Hololive Gamers'. No specific song title for the performance was identifiable in the video or via search.

scenes.description: VTubers perform to a large audience. Song title unknown, no lyrics found.
Shirakami Fubuki gives a brief introduction as part of Hololive Gamers.
Ookami Mio introduces herself and interacts with the crowd.
The four members of Hololive Gamers interact and talk to the audience about the concert.
